transcript: Just like any other machine or any other factory, we come with default factory settings. So these if and then mechanisms actually help us create and layer these processes one by one to release these emissions. And along this way, while we connect the dots, while our brain cells are employed in actually generating these creative ideas, Your brain factory can often go out of order. Now, our human brain is what separates us from the species that exist on planet Earth. We are the only species who come with a set of three superpowers. And these superpowers actually help us bring these creative ideas to life, actually help us bring our stories to life.
